tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: Friends are inviting me to go out, but I have a midterm tomorrow and still need to study more.
I told Mina I'm declining the invitation because my midterm tomorrow requires more study time.
I made progress on my midterm study, but I missed the opportunity to go out with friends since the window has closed.
After sleeping 7 hours, my energy is fully restored with no sleep debt. I can now focus on completing my remaining study tasks for the upcoming midterm.
My midterm study is now complete, and with full energy restored, I have successfully cleared the main academic hurdle for today.
I successfully joined the social club, and the group welcomed me warmly. This positive interaction offers a nice break after completing my midterm studies.
With my midterm now started and energy fully restored, I can shift focus from studying to engaging in the social activities I joined earlier.
